examples: The space shuttle had stopped transmitting data, a very serious anomaly for the mission.
The January warmth turned out to be part of a remarkably persistent weather anomaly.
This iridium anomaly offers strong support for the Alvarez hypothesis even though no asteroid itself has ever been discovered.
Yet another after-life anomaly is the crypt of Santa Maria della Concezione dei Cappuccini on Via Vittorio Veneto.
This is not an attack on you but a statement of the first anomaly itself.
